title: poinsettia radians
intro: Poinsettia radians, also known as the Christmas Star or Poinsettia, is a flowering plant native to Mexico, belonging to the Euphorbiaceae family. The plant's leaves and sap have been used in traditional medicine, containing compounds like poinsettin and betulinic acid, which exhibit antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. Consuming poinsettia leaves or sap can have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and showing potential anticancer properties. Herbal preparations involving poinsettia include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
